# -json prints structured JSON to stdout on success.
exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Filter' -move -json
stdout '"source":'
stdout '"sink":'
stdout '"move": true'
stdout '"matched":'
stdout '"FilterA"'
stdout '"declarations_remaining": 1'
cmp small.go expected_small.go

# -json still prints errors to stderr on failure, no JSON on stdout.
! exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^NoMatch' -json
! stdout '.'
stderr 'no decls matched'

-- big.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
func Other()   {}
-- expected_small.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
